## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (consumers must update)
- [ ] Docs / tutorial only
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Dependency bump
- [ ] Security fix

- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` clean
